## Meeting Purpose

[Strategy sprint standup to discuss progress and next steps across multiple client accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/h8Vyrr1tz3Bhjk_B_uoUk6Gvu9UCed5J?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strong progress on Biologica, aiming for similar rapid results with other clients](https://fathom.video/share/h8Vyrr1tz3Bhjk_B_uoUk6Gvu9UCed5J?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Engine and Airbyte showing high engagement; focus on delivering tangible outputs quickly](https://fathom.video/share/h8Vyrr1tz3Bhjk_B_uoUk6Gvu9UCed5J?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Interwell website redesign underway, shifting to topic hub structure similar to Healthline](https://fathom.video/share/h8Vyrr1tz3Bhjk_B_uoUk6Gvu9UCed5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
  - [Need to reduce work-in-progress and prioritize shipping deliverables across accounts](https://fathom.video/share/h8Vyrr1tz3Bhjk_B_uoUk6Gvu9UCed5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

### Project Management and Execution Strategies

#### Reducing Work-in-Progress

  - [Emphasis on completing and shipping deliverables rather than incremental progress across multiple projects](https://fathom.video/share/h8Vyrr1tz3Bhjk_B_uoUk6Gvu9UCed5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Aim to get more signals and feedback by finishing individual tasks](https://fathom.video/share/h8Vyrr1tz3Bhjk_B_uoUk6Gvu9UCed5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1522.0)

#### Deep Dives and Stakeholder Management

  - [Importance of early, in-depth sessions with key stakeholders (e.g., Biologica success)](https://fathom.video/share/h8Vyrr1tz3Bhjk_B_uoUk6Gvu9UCed5J?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Tailoring communication style to client preferences (e.g., James from Engine prefers concise, outcome-oriented updates)](https://fathom.video/share/h8Vyrr1tz3Bhjk_B_uoUk6Gvu9UCed5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)

#### Design and Development Approach

  - [Lesson learned on providing more prescriptive guidance to designers (e.g., Raise's Figma files for Augment)](https://fathom.video/share/h8Vyrr1tz3Bhjk_B_uoUk6Gvu9UCed5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
  - [George demonstrated rapid prototyping technique for Interwell's redesign using Figma and V0](https://fathom.video/share/h8Vyrr1tz3Bhjk_B_uoUk6Gvu9UCed5J?tab=summary&timestamp=1654.0)
